The '''Medal of Progress''' was an award that was bestowed upon individuals in the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]] who proved themselves in hostile environments. It was later adapted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and awarded to [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]]. It was awarded for [[Battle on the Frontier|successfully establishing]] a new Imperial base or outpost in a pirate-ridden Outer Rim Sector.

==Design==
Its design, at least by the time of the Galactic Civil War under Imperial usage, had two ribbons parallel to each other, with each ribbon being blue ribbons with a red line at the center. The medal itself was primarily silver with gold at the top and onyx at the bottom, as well as an enclave at the center depicting a blue starry mass. A gold object was also in the enclave.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
